name: Certificate Private Key Acquired
notes:
Converted from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Zach Mathis
SIGMA Title: Certificate Private Key Acquired
SIGMA Description: Detects when an application acquires a certificate private key

False positives:
- Legitimate application requesting certificate exports will trigger this. Apply additional filters as needed

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event matches devicetype=12 AND "Event ID"=70 AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Certificate Private Key Acquired on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event matches devicetype=12 AND "Event ID"=70 AQL filter query
